description: HubSpot Private App tokens, OAuth, the deprecated 'API key', webhook v3 HMAC, and customer-data export red flags.

token_patterns.name: HubSpot Legacy API Key (UUID, deprecated 2022)
token_patterns.notes: Deprecated since 30 Nov 2022 — presence in new code is also a deprecation-debt smell.

misconfigurations.title: HubSpot webhook handler does not verify `X-HubSpot-Signature-v3`
misconfigurations.rationale: v3 uses HMAC-SHA256 over method+URI+body+timestamp. Skipping it means any attacker who learns the endpoint URL can spoof contact/deal updates.
misconfigurations.fix: Compute HMAC over `method + uri + body + timestamp` with the app client secret. Reject if timestamp drift > 5 min.

misconfigurations.title: Private App granted more scopes than needed
misconfigurations.rationale: Private Apps default to a wide scope panel — humans tend to tick everything.
misconfigurations.fix: settings > Integrations > Private Apps > review each app; tick only scopes you actively call (use the access-log to verify).

misconfigurations.title: Two-factor authentication not required for portal users
misconfigurations.rationale: HubSpot ATO leads directly to customer-PII exposure.
misconfigurations.fix: settings > Defaults > Security > Two-factor authentication — set to 'Required'.

misconfigurations.title: More than two users with Super Admin role
misconfigurations.rationale: Excessive super-admin count widens blast radius.
misconfigurations.fix: settings > Users & Teams — reduce Super Admin count; use 'Account Access' or custom roles for daily work.

admin_red_flags.title: Bulk contact / deal export by non-marketing principal
admin_red_flags.rationale: Customer-list theft from CRM is a recurring competitor-poaching / phishing-seed vector.
admin_red_flags.signal: settings > Audit log > Export — filter by Export action, alert on rows > 10k or by principal outside Sales Ops.

admin_red_flags.title: New Private App created with broad scopes
admin_red_flags.rationale: Attacker persistence pattern after portal ATO.
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: `private-app:created` with scope list intersecting `contacts.write` / `crm.objects.*.write`.

admin_red_flags.title: Workflow created with 'Trigger a webhook' action posting to an external URL
admin_red_flags.rationale: Workflow webhooks can exfiltrate any property of a contact/deal/company on the fly.
admin_red_flags.signal: Workflow audit: action type = WEBHOOK with target host outside the org's allowlist.
